prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on formaldehyde (CH₂O, 4 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (chemkit tier 'standard', density-fitted) via PySCF, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken from user-supplied .xyz file; not re-relaxed at this level (single point). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. HOMO = −7.6523067 eV, LUMO = −1.7826355 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.8696712 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Total electronic energy = −114.55325 Hartree. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.
